cases.title: In-window participant self check-in stored with timestamp per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event is InProgress with check-in window active (now >= checkinOpenAt and now < checkinCloseAt per exclusive close boundary)
Authenticated participant has registration in Registered state with no prior valid check-in
steps: Invoke checkinService.selfCheckin(eventId, participantActorContext) at a fixed in-window time
Query checkin_records and registration state for the participant
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 row satisfied: self check-in is stored with non-null checkinAt ISO timestamp; registration transitions to CheckedIn; method Self and participant actor reference persisted per BR-13

cases.title: Participant self check-in transitions own Registered registration to CheckedIn when enabled and in window
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event is InProgress with check-in window active (now >= checkinOpenAt and now < checkinCloseAt per exclusive close boundary)
Authenticated participant has registration in Registered state with no prior valid check-in
steps: Invoke checkinService.selfCheckin(eventId, participantActorContext) at a fixed in-window time against real Postgres
Read returned check-in snapshot and linked registration state in the same database session
cases.expected: CheckinRecord is persisted with non-null checkinAt, method Self, and participant actor reference; registration transitions to CheckedIn in the same transaction; no staff operatorId required

cases.title: Self validCheckin transitions registration Registered to CheckedIn
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Registration in Registered state before check-in
Event check-in window contains fixed clock now
No prior valid check-in on the registration
Authenticated participant actor context
steps: Record beforeState as Registered from registration repository
Submit self check-in via checkinService.selfCheckin
Read afterState from registration repository and CheckinRecord
cases.expected: beforeState Registered, afterState CheckedIn per state machine §2 validCheckin trigger; checkinAt timestamp recorded with method Self

cases.title: POST /events/{eventId}/self-checkin returns HTTP 200 with checkinAt and CheckedIn registration
preconditions: E2E fixture event in InProgress state with active check-in window
Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Authenticated participant JWT with Registered registration and no prior check-in
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin with participant Authorization bearer token
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/attendance?page=1&pageSize=20 and locate the participant row
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 200 with non-null checkinAt timestamp, registrationState CheckedIn, participantId matching token subject, and method Self; attendance list includes the participant with matching checkinAt sorted by checkinAt:desc

cases.title: Flow A lifecycle self check-in step succeeds after registration when self-service enabled
preconditions: E2E Flow A fixture: event progressed through publish, open-registration, and participant Registered
Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event started (InProgress) with check-in window open
Participant token from prior registration step
steps: Execute Flow A check-in step: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin with participant token
Verify response before proceeding to feedback step
cases.expected: Check-in response succeeds with non-null checkinAt, method Self, and CheckedIn state, enabling subsequent feedback and eligibility steps in the lifecycle flow

cases.title: Participant completes self check-in via UI and sees success with timestamp
preconditions: Event with self check-in enabled and check-in window currently open (now >= checkinOpenAt and now < checkinCloseAt per exclusive close boundary)
Participant logged in with Registered status for the event
Event in InProgress state allowing check-in
steps: Navigate to /events/{eventId}/check-in (Flow 4 step 1)
System verifies event and registration context (Flow 4 step 2)
Trigger check-in action via primary control (Flow 4 step 3)
Observe success confirmation and check-in status display (Flow 4 step 4)
cases.expected: UI shows check-in succeeded with visible timestamp or time-of-check-in indicator; registration status reflects checked-in state without manual page reload beyond normal client refresh

cases.title: POST self-checkin rejected when self-service check-in is disabled on event
preconditions: Event rule config has participant self check-in disabled
Event InProgress with active check-in window
Authenticated participant JWT with Registered registration and no prior check-in
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin with participant Authorization bearer token
Inspect response status and error envelope
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 422 with stable error code indicating self check-in not enabled (e.g. SELF_CHECKIN_DISABLED); no CheckinRecord created; registration remains Registered

cases.title: Self check-in outside configured window is rejected with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event InProgress with check-in window not containing current fixed clock time
Authenticated participant with Registered registration and no prior check-in
steps: Set fixed clock to a time strictly before checkinOpenAt or after checkinCloseAt
Invoke checkinService.selfCheckin(eventId, participantActorContext)
Query checkin_records and registration state
cases.expected: Request fails with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; no CheckinRecord persisted; registration remains Registered; error details may include checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt per error contract

cases.title: Second self check-in attempt for same registration is rejected after first success
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Participant already has one valid self check-in recorded within the window
Registration state is CheckedIn
Check-in window still open
steps: Attempt a second selfCheckin for the same participant registration
Observe error response and database state
cases.expected: Request fails with stable error code CHECKIN_ALREADY_RECORDED (409 or 422); original checkinAt unchanged; no duplicate CheckinRecord created per BR-11

cases.title: Concurrent self check-in requests yield at most one valid record
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Registered participant with no prior check-in
Active check-in window
Two or more parallel selfCheckin requests from the same participant actor
steps: Fire concurrent selfCheckin (or API POST self-checkin) calls for the same participant registration
Count valid CheckinRecord rows and inspect registration state after all requests settle
cases.expected: Exactly one check-in succeeds with timestamp and method Self; other requests receive CHECKIN_ALREADY_RECORDED or equivalent conflict; registration ends in CheckedIn with single valid check-in invariant preserved

cases.title: Unauthenticated POST self-checkin returns 401
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event InProgress with active check-in window
No Authorization bearer token on request
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin without Authorization header
cases.expected: HTTP 401 Unauthenticated per AC-15; no CheckinRecord created; no registration state change

cases.title: OrganizerStaff JWT cannot invoke participant self-checkin endpoint
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event InProgress with active check-in window
OrganizerStaff JWT with scope for the event (staff has own user account, not a participant registration)
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin with staff Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 403 Forbidden or 404 indicating no eligible participant registration; no CheckinRecord created; self-checkin endpoint is participant-only per permission matrix

cases.title: Participant without Registered registration for event cannot self check-in
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event InProgress with active check-in window
Authenticated participant JWT with no active registration (never registered, cancelled, or waitlisted only) for the event
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin with participant Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 404 or 422 with typed domain error indicating no checkinable registration; no CheckinRecord created; participant can only operate on own registration data per FR-26

cases.title: Self check-in rejected when registration is not in Registered state
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event with active check-in window
Participant registration in Waitlisted, CancelledByUser, CheckedIn, or other non-checkinable state
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin with participant Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 409 or 422 with typed domain error indicating invalid transition; no CheckinRecord created; registration state unchanged

cases.title: Self check-in UI displays blocking reason when window is closed
preconditions: Event with self check-in enabled
Participant logged in with Registered status for the event
Event InProgress but check-in window closed
steps: Navigate to event self check-in entry page
Attempt check-in action or observe disabled state on primary control
Read displayed blocking reason or error message
cases.expected: UI communicates check-in unavailable with explicit reason (window closed or not yet open); participant remains not checked in; no success timestamp displayed per Flow 4 edge-case expectations

cases.title: Self check-in UI unavailable or blocked when self-service is disabled
preconditions: Event rule config has participant self check-in disabled
Participant logged in with Registered status for the event
Event InProgress with open check-in window
steps: Navigate to event detail or check-in entry route as registered participant
Observe availability of self check-in affordance
cases.expected: Self check-in control is hidden, disabled, or shows explicit message that self-service check-in is not enabled; participant cannot complete self check-in via UI

cases.title: Self check-in persists audit metadata with participant actor and method Self
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
In-window self check-in about to be recorded
Known participant userId in actor context
steps: Perform successful self check-in via checkinService.selfCheckin
Inspect persisted CheckinRecord fields and any linked audit module write
cases.expected: CheckinRecord includes non-null checkinAt, method Self, and participant actor reference (no staff operatorId); audit trail satisfies BR-13 requirement for timestamp, actor, and method on every check-in write

cases.title: Self check-in write and registration CheckedIn transition commit atomically
preconditions: Database transaction boundary enabled for check-in module per cross-module contract
Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Registered participant, in-window, no prior check-in
steps: Complete successful in-window self check-in
Query checkin_records row and registration state in the same database session immediately after commit
cases.expected: CheckinRecord with method Self and registration CheckedIn state exist together; partial writes (record without state change or vice versa) do not occur

cases.title: Idempotent self check-in retry with same Idempotency-Key returns consistent snapshot
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Registered participant with active check-in window
Participant JWT
Fixed Idempotency-Key header value K for self-checkin write endpoint
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin with Idempotency-Key K and receive success with checkinAt
Repeat POST with the same Idempotency-Key K
cases.expected: Both responses return HTTP 200 with the same checkinAt and registrationId; only one CheckinRecord exists; no duplicate state transition side effects

cases.title: Self check-in success returns immediate actionable feedback without polling
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Registered participant with active check-in window
Participant JWT
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin with participant token
Inspect synchronous response body without follow-up polling
cases.expected: HTTP 200 response includes checkinAt, registrationState CheckedIn, and method Self in a single round trip; client receives immediate success confirmation satisfying NFR-13 for critical check-in action

cases.title: Failed self check-in returns immediate reason code with standard error envelope
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Registered participant on event with closed check-in window
Participant JWT
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin while outside the configured window
Parse error envelope from response
cases.expected: Synchronous HTTP 422 (or 409) with error.code CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED, user-safe message, details.checkinOpenAt and details.checkinCloseAt ISO timestamps, non-empty requestId, and timestamp per error-handling §3 standard envelope; satisfies NFR-13 immediate feedback with explicit failure reason

cases.title: Self check-in UI disables primary action at checkinCloseAt when API excludes close instant
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event InProgress with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Fixed clock set exactly to checkinCloseAt
Participant logged in with Registered registration and no prior check-in
steps: Navigate to event self check-in page
Inspect primary check-in control state and any blocking message
Attempt check-in if control is visible
cases.expected: canSelfCheckIn returns false; primary check-in button is disabled or hidden; UI does not show a success path when API policy rejects at close boundary (now >= checkinCloseAt); participant remains not checked in

cases.title: Dev JWT sub alias participant-1 self check-in succeeds when registration stored under resolved UUID
preconditions: Event InProgress with active check-in window and self check-in enabled
Participant registered via dev sub participant-1; registration row participant_id is resolveActorId(participant-1)
Dev JWT with sub participant-1 and Participant role
No prior check-in for the registration
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin with dev participant-1 Authorization bearer
Query checkin_records and registration state for the resolved participant UUID
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with checkinAt, method Self, and registrationState CheckedIn; not HTTP 404 (no registration) or HTTP 403 (own-registration false negative); actor ID alias resolution applied before DB lookup

cases.title: Self check-in page submit succeeds when UI gate shows check-in available
preconditions: Event InProgress with active check-in window (now >= checkinOpenAt and now < checkinCloseAt)
Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Participant logged in with Registered registration and no prior check-in
Self check-in page shows enabled primary control (canSelfCheckIn true, mirroring API assertCheckinWindowOpen and assertSelfCheckinAllowed)
steps: Navigate to /events/{eventId}/check-in
Confirm UI gate permits check-in (button enabled, no window-closed or disabled-self-service blocker)
Trigger check-in via primary control
Observe network response and success UI
cases.expected: POST self-checkin returns HTTP 200; UI shows check-in success with timestamp; no mismatch where UI gate passes but API returns 404, 403, SELF_CHECKIN_DISABLED, or CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; satisfies NFR-13 UI/API parity on critical self check-in action

cases.title: Self check-in at checkinOpenAt boundary instant is recorded when open boundary is inclusive
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event configured with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Fixed clock set exactly to checkinOpenAt
Registered participant with no prior check-in
Authenticated participant actor context
steps: Invoke checkinService.selfCheckin(eventId, participantActorContext) at checkinOpenAt boundary instant
Query CheckinRecord and registration state
cases.expected: Self check-in succeeds per configured window policy; checkinAt persisted and registration is CheckedIn with method Self

cases.title: Self check-in at checkinCloseAt boundary instant is rejected when close boundary is exclusive
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event configured with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Fixed clock set exactly to checkinCloseAt
Registered participant with no prior check-in
Authenticated participant actor context
steps: Invoke checkinService.selfCheckin(eventId, participantActorContext) at checkinCloseAt boundary instant
Query checkin_records and registration state
cases.expected: Request fails with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; exclusive close boundary treats checkinCloseAt as out-of-window (valid window is checkinOpenAt <= now < checkinCloseAt); no CheckinRecord persisted; registration remains Registered
